@graph.description: GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper-binding tripeptide with a genuinely well-supported topical cosmetic evidence base — including human RCTs for skin firmness, fine lines, and wound healing — plus a separate, much less-evidenced injectable/RUO research-peptide use.
@graph.name: GHK-Cu
